name: computer-use-mcp
description: 💻 MCP server for Claude to control your computer. Implements computer use capabilities similar to Anthropic's official computer use guide.

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Inspect monitors, visible windows, system time, and cursor position.

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Bring a visible desktop window to the foreground by PID or name.

tools.name: computer_toggle_session
tools.description: Start or end a visible computer-control session.

tools.name: computer_use
tools.description: Run ordered desktop actions in an active computer-control session, including screenshots, clicks, typing, scrolling, and sleep.
